history.answer:
The situation remains unchanged from the last known answer. I have sufficient confirmation.

No Revolut partnership with a specific Tel Aviv (Ben Gurion) airport lounge has been announced, so the situation is unchanged.  Revolut has switched its airport lounge access partner from DragonPass to LoungeKey , and customers can still book access through that third-party lounge network rather than through any Revolut-specific Tel Aviv lounge. The only recent Ben Gurion lounge development is unrelated to Revolut:  a new Jetex lounge has opened at Ben Gurion, offering good news for Israeli Amex cardholders but not for Americans .
history.summary: Still no Revolut partnership with a Tel Aviv airport lounge

history.answer: No Revolut partnership with a specific Tel Aviv (Ben Gurion) airport lounge has been announced, so the situation is unchanged.  Revolut offers unlimited free access to over 1,600 airport lounges worldwide, and lets any customer book at those lounges regardless of plan.  This access is provided through third-party lounge networks rather than a Revolut-specific Tel Aviv lounge, and  Revolut is switching its airport lounge access partner from DragonPass to LoungeKey.  The only recent Ben Gurion lounge development is unrelated to Revolut:  American Express Israel and aviation company Jetex have partnered to open a new premium lounge at Ben Gurion Airport, with access restricted to holders of Israeli cards.
history.summary: Still no Revolut partnership with a Tel Aviv airport lounge

q_mrnblfkexba27m.currentAnswer: No official release date has been set for The White Lotus Season 4.  There is no premiere date for The White Lotus Season 4 yet, but production for the latest chapter kicked off in France on April 15, 2026.   There's still no premiere date, but a 2027 debut is widely considered the safest bet, though HBO's early renewal and active production timeline could help shorten the turnaround.   The season is set on the French Riviera, filming across Cannes, St. Tropez, and Monaco, and will follow a new group of guests and employees over the span of a week set during the Cannes Film Festival.
q_mrnblfkexba27m.currentSummary: No official release date yet; 2027 debut expected

history.answer: No official release date has been set for The White Lotus Season 4.  There is no premiere date for The White Lotus Season 4 yet, but production for the latest chapter kicked off in France on April 15, 2026.   There's still no premiere date, but a 2027 debut is widely considered the safest bet, though HBO's early renewal and active production timeline could help shorten the turnaround.   The season is set on the French Riviera, filming across Cannes, St. Tropez, and Monaco, and will follow a new group of guests and employees over the span of a week set during the Cannes Film Festival.

q_mrnbmh9ne6oerm.currentAnswer: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey opens in theaters on July 17, 2026, with early showings available on July 16 starting at 2 p.m. ET.   The film premiered on July 6, 2026, at the Empire Leicester Square in London, ahead of a theatrical release by Universal Pictures on July 17 in the United States and the United Kingdom.   It brings Homer's foundational saga to IMAX film screens for the first time and stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong'o, among others.
q_mrnbmh9ne6oerm.currentSummary: The Odyssey releases July 17, 2026 via Universal Pictures

history.answer: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey opens in theaters on July 17, 2026, with early showings available on July 16 starting at 2 p.m. ET.   The film premiered on July 6, 2026, at the Empire Leicester Square in London, ahead of a theatrical release by Universal Pictures on July 17 in the United States and the United Kingdom.   It brings Homer's foundational saga to IMAX film screens for the first time and stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong'o, among others.
history.summary: The Odyssey releases July 17, 2026 via Universal Pictures
